The [[Carbanti United Electronics/Legends|Carbanti United Electronics]] '''universal transceiver package''' was a [[Sensor array/Legends|sensor package]] used on the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] [[X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing starfighter]]. It was comprised of several standard [[Sensor/Legends|sensor]] units, including a short-range [[Targeting sensor/Legends|target-acquiring sensor]], an active long-range sensor array, a [[Dedicated energy receptor/Legends|dedicated energy receptor]], and an [[electro photo receptor]]. Interface ports also accepted supplemental sensors, making it one of the most flexible and easily upgraded [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] array systems. It was coupled with a [[Bertriak/Legends|Bertriak]] [["Screamer" active jammer]].<ref name="EGWT" />
